vibe: Punchy, comedic, neo-brutalist. High-energy with sharp contrasts to make the colorful book covers pop. Playful but highly structured.

rules: Headings must use tracking-tighter (-0.05em) and leading-none.
Never use Inter for headings. Avoid Space Grotesk.
Use font-black for massive impact on Hero and CTA sections.
Body text should be readable, leading-relaxed.

spacing_and_layout.strategy: Brutalist Bento Grid. High contrast, sharp lines, asymmetric.
spacing_and_layout.card_style: bg-white border-2 border-zinc-950 shadow-[6px_6px_0px_0px_rgba(9,9,11,1)] hover:shadow-[10px_10px_0px_0px_rgba(9,9,11,1)] hover:-translate-y-1 transition-all duration-200 rounded-none p-6 md:p-8

components.buttons: bg-[#FFDE00] text-zinc-950 border-2 border-zinc-950 px-8 py-4 font-black uppercase tracking-widest hover:-translate-y-1 hover:shadow-[6px_6px_0px_0px_rgba(9,9,11,1)] transition-all rounded-none
components.inputs: bg-white border-2 border-zinc-950 rounded-none px-4 py-3 focus:ring-0 focus:border-zinc-950 focus:shadow-[4px_4px_0px_0px_rgba(9,9,11,1)] outline-none transition-shadow w-full font-medium
components.progress_bar: h-4 w-full bg-zinc-200 border-2 border-zinc-950 rounded-none overflow-hidden. Fill should be #FFDE00 with a right border of 2px solid black.
components.badges: bg-zinc-950 text-white px-3 py-1 text-xs font-bold uppercase tracking-wider rounded-none

book_covers.description: Mãe, Eu Quero Um Apocalipse Zumbi!
As Histórias Mais Sem Graça do Mundo

hero_background.description: Use CSS radial-gradient or grid pattern background (e.g., background-image: radial-gradient(#09090B 2px, transparent 2px); background-size: 32px 32px; opacity: 0.1) to give a subtle comic-book/halftone feel without cluttering.

header.style: Sticky, glassmorphism (backdrop-blur-xl bg-white/90), bottom border 2px solid #09090B. Logo in font-black text-2xl uppercase.

hero.layout: Grid 12-cols. Left side (col-span-12 md:col-span-7): Massive H1 text 'APOIE A COMÉDIA. LEIA UM LIVRO.', subtitle, and prominent Yellow CTA. Right side (col-span-12 md:col-span-5): The featured active campaign card. Overlapping elements for depth.
hero.visuals: CSS Dot pattern background behind the hero content.

campaigns_grid.layout: Grid cols-1 md:cols-2 lg:cols-3. Use brutalist cards. Each card displays Book Cover (filling top half), Title, Progress Bar, Raised Amount vs Goal, Days Left, and 'Apoiar' button.
campaigns_grid.rules: Card content must have proper padding. Image at top must have a bottom border of 2px solid #09090B.

campaign_detail.layout: Two columns. Left (col-span-12 lg:col-span-8): Big image, Video placeholder, Description, Comments. Right (col-span-12 lg:col-span-4 sticky top-24): Funding stats, Progress bar, and stacked 'Recompensas' (Tiers) cards.
campaign_detail.tiers: Each tier card must be a brutalist card, showing Price, Title, Delivery Date, Items Included. Clickable to trigger checkout modal/page.

biography.layout: Asymmetric bento box. One large photo of Edegar, text blocks with solid black borders and yellow accents.
biography.typography: Large drop cap for the first letter of the bio.

newsletter.style: Massive section. bg-[#FFDE00]. Huge black typography. Input form side-by-side with a bold black submit button.
newsletter.text: RECEBA PIADAS (E SPAM DE LIVROS) NO SEU EMAIL.

admin_dashboard.style: Clean, dense. Table view for max 10 active campaigns. Sidebar for navigation. Shadcn UI tables customized with sharp borders.
admin_dashboard.actions: Create Campaign (with logic enforcing ALL campaigns deliver products even if R$0 raised), Edit Tiers, View Backers. Dashboard must explicitly show the 5% platform fee deduction on totals.

motion_and_interactions.hover: Brutalist shadow expansion (shadow goes from 6px to 10px, element translates up and left by 4px).
motion_and_interactions.marquee: Use a slow-moving marquee strip separating the Hero and Campaigns section. Text: 'FINANCIAMENTO COLETIVO • PRODUTO ENTREGUE MESMO SE FATURAR R$0 • APOIE A COMÉDIA • ' in uppercase, font-black, bg-zinc-950 text-[#FFDE00] py-4 text-2xl.
motion_and_interactions.icons: Use Phosphor Icons (duotone or bold) for a sharp, high-end feel.

testing.rules: All interactive elements must have data-testid. Examples: data-testid='hero-support-btn', data-testid='campaign-card-1', data-testid='checkout-submit-btn', data-testid='admin-create-campaign'.

instructions_to_main_agent: Use pure Tailwind + HTML for layout structure; Shadcn for complex interactives (Modals, Forms, Tables) but strip the default soft look and apply the 2px black border / sharp corners styling (Neo-Brutalism).
Implement the marquee between sections using standard CSS keyframes or 'react-fast-marquee'.
Ensure 'Outfit' and 'DM Sans' fonts are imported properly from Google Fonts.
Do NOT use generic rounded soft shadows. Use hard offset shadows defined in card_style.
Map the 3 provided book cover URLs directly into the mock campaigns data.
Integrate a checkout flow (mocked Stripe/Pix) that visually reinforces the 5% fee logic.
Admin can create up to 10 campaigns with value, date, and rewards. Show this limit in the UI.
